arts.ttl: Manchester United ‘strongly interested’ in PSG left-back
arts.sum: Manchester United are ‘strongly interested’ in signing Nuno Mendes from Paris Saint-Germain as the club look to land a new left-back. Ruben Amorim has made the signing of a left-back his first focus as manager with Luke Shaw and Tyrell Malacia consistently unavailable over the last 18 months.
